reviewBoundary: Reusable lifecycle primitives for COS WEAVE local file state. They are not live service, deployment, or tracker proof.

primitives.name: Intent Record
primitives.customerUse: Preserves owner words, inferred app, boundaries, and missing information.

primitives.name: Research Brief
primitives.customerUse: Records product-market facts, users, alternatives, substitutes, competitors, antagonists, disconfirming evidence, feasibility, source needs, assumptions, opinions, and risks before selection.

primitives.name: Selection Record
primitives.customerUse: Shows chosen path, rejected alternatives, tradeoffs, and reversibility.

primitives.name: Execution Plan
primitives.customerUse: Turns the selected wedge into bounded work packets and checks.

primitives.name: Engineering Proof
primitives.customerUse: Links implementation artifacts, commands, limits, and changed files.

primitives.name: QA Proof
primitives.customerUse: Records happy-path, failure-path, and claim-boundary validation.

primitives.name: Deployment Gate
primitives.customerUse: Names target, owner approval boundary, post-deploy QA, and non-claims.

primitives.name: KPI Setup
primitives.customerUse: Defines meaningful metrics, data boundary, and review cadence.

primitives.name: Marketing Gate
primitives.customerUse: Prepares truthful claims, channel plan, and public-send approval boundary.

primitives.name: Iteration Record
primitives.customerUse: Maps feedback or evidence to bounded changes and regression checks.

primitives.name: Analysis Record
primitives.customerUse: Compares outcome to intent and recommends continue, pivot, or stop.
